title: $MSTR Drops to $91.79 on $STRC — 'Valley of Despair' After Record Capital Raise
summary: MicroStrategy's stock ($MSTR) is currently trading at $91.79 on $STRC, down sharply from its recent highs. Just a month ago, the instrument was raising record amounts of capital and absorbing billions in demand, but it now finds itself in what many would call the 'valley of despair.' The post notes that this isn't what the instrument was designed for.
body: MicroStrategy's stock ($MSTR) is currently trading at $91.79 on $STRC, representing a significant decline from its recent performance. The tweet by @zaidlikesmstr describes this as the "valley of despair." Just a month ago, the instrument was raising record amounts of capital and absorbing billions of dollars in demand. Truthfully, this isn’t what the instrument was designed for, according to the original post. The drop underscores the high volatility associated with Bitcoin-linked instruments, and the company's massive Bitcoin holdings continue to tie its stock performance closely to the cryptocurrency market.
twitterThread: $MSTR is currently trading at $91.79 on $STRC, what many call the 'valley of despair.' Just a month ago it was raising record capital and absorbing billions in demand.
Truthfully, this isn’t what the instrument was designed for, as noted by @zaidlikesmstr. The drop ties directly to Bitcoin's recent volatility.

Key takeaway: Bitcoin-linked instruments like MSTR carry extreme risk. This downturn shows that even record demand can be followed by sharp declines. Full story → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-17-microstrategys-stock-hits-9179-amid-market-downturn
standaloneTweet: $MSTR just hit $91.79 on $STRC — 'valley of despair' after record capital raise a month ago. @zaidlikesmstr says truthfully, this isn’t what the instrument was designed for. High risk for Bitcoin-linked stocks.
